authorization: Authorize T1 RSI MNQ Tier-N spec PLAN only.

first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_b005_nnn_b006_nnn_t8: Different asset class (futures vs equity ETFs); different mechanic family where applicable
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_parallel_s13_d1: Distinct chain at non-colliding paths; parallel uses longer naming s13_d1_..._databento_long_history; T1 uses operator-specified shorter naming; both chains coexist; this T1 PLAN does NOT modify any parallel artifact
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s10_d1: Different mechanic family; different universe (MNQ.c.0 only vs MNQ+MGC); MGC continuous-stitch DR9 failure structurally absent
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s10_d2: Different mechanic family; different universe (single MNQ.c.0 vs 4-market portfolio)
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s11_d1: Different mechanic family; higher expected signal frequency by ~5-6x
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s12_d1: Different mechanic family (F3 RSI mean-reversion vs F1 Donchian trend); different signal generator (oscillator vs channel breakout); different expected signal frequency (~50-65/y vs ~7-10/y); S12-D1 falsification does NOT transfer (load-bearing cause was channel-breakout signal generator, not universe choice)
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s7_d1: Different mechanic family (RSI vs Donchian); NO pyramid in T1; different universe
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s8_d1: Different mechanic family; different universe (single vs multi-market); sizing fix inherited
first_principles_burden_vs_predecessors.vs_s9: Different universe (MNQ futures vs SPY/TLT/GLD/USO ETF-proxy); different signal direction (bi-directional vs s9's long-only); different asset class (futures vs equity ETFs); different cost surface; s9 falsification cause (instrument-specific cost/edge interaction) does NOT transfer

k9_reachability_analysis_at_plan.honest_disclosure: OOS K9 at lower-bound estimate (46 trades/year) is BELOW the 50/y threshold and would fire OOS K9. At central/upper estimates the candidate clears OOS K9 by margin. T1 is in a structurally more favorable position than S12-D1 (lower-bound clearance ratio 0.92 vs s12-d1's 0.80) but OOS K9 clearance is NOT guaranteed at lower-bound estimate.

t1_expected_trade_frequency.comparison_vs_s12_d1_donchian_15_8: 5-6x higher signal density than S12-D1's ~7-10 trades/year
t1_expected_trade_frequency.source: RSI(2) historical trade-frequency literature (Connors); adapted for bi-directional + futures cost surface

k_gates_framework_deferred_to_seal.firing_priority_order: K8 > K12 > K7 > K9 > K1/K2/K4 > A-gates > ELIGIBLE_FOR_OOS

entry_exit_framework.note: Exact entry/exit threshold numerics within {5,10,15,20} oversold and {50,60} centerline bands deferred to DRAFT as DA-register items; structural framework locked at PLAN

locked_at_plan_load_bearing.rsi_period_rationale: Connors canonical RSI(2) for maximum signal density on daily bars; alternatives 3/4 reserved as DRAFT-level revisions only via fresh candidate_record_id (NOT _revN_)

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method
